response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is exclusively in full-stack web, mobile, and embedded software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Extensive background in performance-critical systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture for AI accelerators
Absence of deep-learning workload optimization or GPU performance analysis
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator hardware expertise
No SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design experience
Web/embedded software focus vs. required infrastructure optimization
